methodsAttempted.notes: Found ITSO guidelines, CEI policies, and ITSO tools pages.
Found library FAQ and academic integrity related pages.
Found CEI guidelines, assessment design, and education resources.
Found ITSO data desensitization and privacy guidance.

summary: Discovery identified 7 verified policy-relevant sources across ITSO (GenAI guidelines, tools, Copilot, data desensitization), CEI (teaching policies, assessment design), and Academic Registry (assessment policies). 2 sources rejected as news/blog format or low policy specificity. Primary discovery via Firecrawl site_search queries on hkust.edu.hk and cei.hkust.edu.hk domains.
